title: Disable Ender Chests
body:
# What does it do?
This mod removes the recipe for Ender Chests, aswell as disable interaction  
*By causing naturally generating Ender Chests to break on contact*

## Who is this for?
This mod is made for modpack devs/server operators who want an easy way  
to prevent players from using Ender Chests.  
They can be troublesome on servers that allow raiding
